name: Chimpanzini Watermelonini Kingini
lore:
Lore of Chimpanzini Watermelonini Kingini
                                    


Shimpanzini Watermelonini Kingini is a brainrot that was used in the game Brainrot Evolution, it is a Italian Brainrot character and is the older relative of Chimpanzini Bananini [1]and Chimpanzini Bananini Priestini he also has lyrics in a weird way and resembles Italian language. It was a alternated or assistant to brainrot to this wiki. The person who posted it was @alexey_pigeon.
Lyrics
Original (Italian)
Shimpanzini Watermelonini Kingini.. Waa, waa, waa. Chimpanzuchi Watermelonucci. Or... Chimpanzini Bananini Mongkini. Bom, bom, bom. Chimpanzuchi Bananuchi. Or... Chimpanzini Ananasini Lancerini. Balumbabig. Chimpanzuchi Ananazuchi, forte combattente corpo a corpo. Or... Chimpanzini Orangini Berserkini. Babubalakuka. Chimanzucci Orangucci, un guerriero venuto derriettamente dalle porte del e inferno. Or... Chimpanzini Plummini Sabermasterini. Zazasalakuka. Zscimpanucci Pluminucci, maestro di combattimento con la spada. Or... Chimpanzini Cocco Guardini. Badabim, chimpanucci coconucci, diffensore affidabile guerriro impenetrabile.
Translated (English)
Shimpanzini Watermelon Kingini.. Waa, waa, waa. Chimpanzuchi Watermelonucci. Or Chimpanzini Bananini Mongkini. Boom, boom, boom. Chimpanzuchi Bananuchi. Or Chimpanzini Ananasini Lancerini. Balumbabig. Chimpanzuchi Ananazuchi, strong hand-to-hand fighter. Or Chimpanzini Orangini Berserkini. Babubalakuka. Chimanzucci Orangucci, a warrior who came directly from the gates of hell. Or Chimpanzini Plummini Sabermasterini. Zazasalakuka. Zschimpanucci Pluminucci, master of sword fighting. Or Chimpanzini Cocco Guardini. Badabim Chimpanucci Coconucci, reliable defender and impenetrable warrior.
